message:
Fix vllm-d deploy: make namespace step non-fatal

ARC runner SA (arc-systems:default) lacks namespace get permission.
The kc namespace already exists, so use continue-on-error to avoid
blocking the deploy.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,7 +108,8 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Create namespace if not exists
         run: |
-          kubectl create namespace kc --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
+          kubectl get namespace kc >/dev/null 2>&1 || kubectl create namespace kc
+        continue-on-error: true
 
       - name: Create or update secrets
         run: |
